sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11346" key="a)pambrako/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαμβρᾰκόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n11346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be patient, endure</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμβρακόομαι</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:5D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
